assertions.title: Two tabs with different sessions are isolated

steps.observed: Active session with 'End meditation session' button

steps.expected: New tab shows different session state

assertions.title: Logout in one tab logs out both

steps.observed: Tab 2 still shows logged-in UI (profile buttons) without redirect
UI still shows 'Log out of your account', 'Edit profile' buttons
After refresh, tab 2 shows login page

evidence.consoleErrors: 401 Unauthorized errors in tab 2 after logout in tab 1, before refresh
evidence.network: Tab 2 API calls return 401 after tab 1 logout

assertions.issues: Logout is not automatically broadcast across tabs. While the backend properly invalidates the session (API calls return 401), tab 2's UI does not automatically redirect to login - user must manually refresh the page.

frictions.description: Tab 2 did not automatically redirect to login after tab 1 logged out - required manual page reload
frictions.resolution: After manual refresh of tab 2, it correctly shows login page. The auth state IS properly shared (401 errors prove this), but the UI doesn't auto-update without refresh.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-CONCURRENT-001), 1 failed (VAL-CONCURRENT-002). Sessions are properly isolated between tabs, but logout in one tab does not automatically log out the other tab - requires page reload to reflect the change.
